blocks.text: Maguire sees red — now the Bernabéu weekend begins

Hovland toils at T90 at Valspar — a rough week for Norway's flag bearer. The real action arrives Sunday: Barcelona (fresh off a 7-2 CL demolition of Newcastle) host Rayo, then El Derbi settles scores at the Bernabéu.

blocks.label: ⚽ Sunday — derby double and El Derbi
items: ⚽ 13:00 — Sunderland vs Newcastle United (Tyne-Wear derby, St. James' Park)
⚽ 14:00 — Barcelona vs Rayo Vallecano (Camp Nou, La Liga)
⚽ 21:00 — Real Madrid vs Atlético Madrid ★ El Derbi at the Bernabéu
